narration: HARKing stands for Hypothesizing After Results are Known. It’s a sneaky way some scientists may distort truth.
visual_description: Context visual: HARKing stands for Hypothesizing After Results are Known. It’s a sneaky way some scientists may distort truth.

narration: Imagine running an experiment, seeing unexpected results, and then changing your hypothesis to match. Sounds fishy, right?
